remarks: Enjoy vibrant downtown Stamford living in this updated 1-bedroom, 1-bath residence at 700 Summer Street. Offering approximately 900 square feet of comfortable living space, this bright and inviting unit features all-new flooring throughout, along with an updated kitchen and bath. Heat, hot water, cooking gas, and garage parking are all included in the rent! Step out onto your private balcony overlooking Summer Street and take in the city views. Whether you're enjoying your morning coffee, relaxing after work, or enjoying Stamford's seasonal parades and community events from your own private vantage point, the balcony provides a unique extension of the living space and a front-row seat to downtown living.  Residents enjoy a variety of desirable amenities, including a fitness center, secure building access, security cameras, updated laundry room with brand new washers and dryers, and designated garage parking. Ideally located in the heart of Stamford, you're just moments from restaurants, shopping, entertainment, parks, and transportation, making this an exceptional opportunity to enjoy all that downtown Stamford has to offer.
